title: betencourtia australis
intro: Betencourtia australis, also known as the Desert Lavender, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. Betencourtia australis offers various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality due to its calming effects. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to leverage its medicinal properties.
